title: Feeding the Cat
content: Every morning, Olivia feeds her cat before getting ready for work. Her cat, Luna, waits near the kitchen and meows loudly when she hears the food bag opening. After eating, Luna usually jumps onto the sofa and watches birds through the window. Olivia smiles every time she sees her cat stretching comfortably in the sunlight. Before leaving home, she always checks the water bowl and gently pets Luna goodbye. Taking care of her cat is one of Olivia’s favorite parts of her daily routine.
